action_text: Press Escape to close the search context popover
rationale: The “Choose search context” popover from the global search is open and may be blocking clicks on the report list. Dismissing it will let us interact with the list controls.

action_text: Click the Show/Hide filter icon on the report list
rationale: We need to locate a specific report by title. Showing the list filter allows us to add a condition like Title contains “incidents” or “agent.”

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort the reports by title
rationale: Sorting by Title can help quickly locate a report named “Incidents by agent” if it exists in the list.

action_text: Click the Table column header to sort by table name
rationale: The target report should be based on the Incident table. Sorting by Table helps cluster all Incident-based reports together for easier scanning.

action_text: Open the visible report by clicking its Title in the list
rationale: If only a few reports are visible, opening the currently listed one may reveal it’s the needed “incidents by agent” chart or provide navigation breadcrumbs to related reports.
